pi_items.source: Queried RCSB PDB API for 1STP and verified it's the structure of streptavidin.
Queried RCSB PDB API for 1STP and verified the biotin ligand ID is BTN.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real structural data fetched dynamically from the Protein Data Bank (PDB). Specifically, it targets the high-resolution structure of streptavidin, PDB ID 1STP, and its corresponding electron density map. The biotin ligand in this structure is correctly identified by the residue name BTN. The output file paths for the PNG figure, PyMOL session file (.pse), and density text report match the requirements evaluated by the export script and verifier.
